# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="comments-section">
                <h3>Comments</h3>
                @if($post->comments->count() > 0)
                    @foreach($post->comments as $comment)
                        <div class="comment">
                            <div class="comment-author">
                                {{ $comment->user->name }}
                            </div>
                            <div class="comment-content">
                                {!! $comment->content !!}
                            </div>
                            <div class="comment-date">
                                {{ $comment->created_at->format('M j, Y g:i A') }}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    @endforeach
                @else
                    <p>No comments yet. Be the first to comment!</p>
                @endif
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
@endsection
